text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 36 

CATARACT 

LABEL: Cataract End-of-Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
a cataract as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: CATARACT 

LONG NAME: CATARACT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Beneficiary did not meet claims criteria or
